inputs.label: Fluid Ounces
inputs.businessContext: Amount of fluid ounces to convert to milliliters

businessContext_i18n.en: Amount of fluid ounces to convert to milliliters
businessContext_i18n.de: Menge der Flüssigunzen zur Umrechnung in Milliliter
businessContext_i18n.fr: Quantité d'onces liquides à convertir en millilitres
businessContext_i18n.es: Cantidad de onzas líquidas a convertir a mililitros

inputs.label: Ounce Standard (0=US, 1=UK)
inputs.businessContext: Select the fluid ounce standard: 0 for US customary (29.5735 ml), 1 for Imperial (28.4131 ml)

businessContext_i18n.en: Select the fluid ounce standard: 0 for US customary (29.5735 ml), 1 for Imperial (28.4131 ml)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sıvı ons standardını seçin: 0 ABD geleneksel (29.5735 ml), 1 İmparatorluk (28.4131 ml)
businessContext_i18n.de: Wählen Sie den Flüssigunzen-Standard: 0 für US-amerikanisch (29,5735 ml), 1 für Imperial (28,4131 ml)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Sélectionnez le standard d'once liquide : 0 pour US (29,5735 ml), 1 pour Impérial (28,4131 ml)
businessContext_i18n.es: Seleccione el estándar de onza líquida: 0 para el sistema estadounidense (29.5735 ml), 1 para el imperial (28.4131 ml)

inputs.label: Decimal Precision
inputs.businessContext: Round the output to this many decimal places

businessContext_i18n.en: Round the output to this many decimal places
businessContext_i18n.de: Runden Sie das Ergebnis auf diese Anzahl Dezimalstellen
businessContext_i18n.fr: Arrondir le résultat à ce nombre de décimales
businessContext_i18n.es: Redondear el resultado a este número de decimales

inputs.label: Batch Size
inputs.businessContext: Number of identical volumes to convert (for total mL)

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of identical volumes to convert (for total mL)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dönüştürülecek özdeş hacim sayısı (toplam mL için)
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der identischen Volumen zur Umrechnung (für Gesamt-ml)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de volumes identiques à convertir (pour le total en mL)
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de volúmenes idénticos a convertir (para el total en ml)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
